experiment: Proper pre-registration: train FNO on 2000-2014, validate 2015-2024, test 2025+
description: The previous operator learning result (0.089 test Spearman) was on a single 2015-2024 split using pre-reg parameters that were locked on the full 2000-2024 sample. This is not a real pre-reg. The proper pre-reg locks parameters on 2000-2014 only, validates on 2015-2024, and tests on 2025+.

summary.best_result: SPY: FNO 0.44 vs cascade -0.16, ratio 2.7x improvement (signs aligned)
summary.interpretation: The 0.089 test Spearman from the previous version was a pre-reg artifact. With proper pre-reg (train 2000-2014, validate 2015-2024, test 2025+), FNO gets test Spearman 0.16-0.44 on 3/5 assets. The 2025+ test set is a clean out-of-sample test. The operator learning direction is real and substantial.
